steps.title: Add the equations
steps.content: The system is arranged so the $y$-terms cancel if you add the two equations: $$(x+4)+(x-4)=(-2y+9)+(2y+5).$$

steps.title: Simplify directly to the target
steps.content: On the left, $(x+4)+(x-4)=2x$. On the right, $-2y+2y=0$ and $9+5=14$. Therefore, $$2x=14.$$

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: The question asks for $2x$, so there is no need to solve for $x$ or $y$. The value is $14$, which matches C. The value $7$ is the trap from giving $x$ instead of $2x$.
